title: Access any other relevant learning paths

blocks.content:
Your Grafana Cloud foundation is established, but your observability journey is just beginning. Grafana provides numerous learning paths designed to help you master specific technologies, use cases, and advanced techniques for monitoring and troubleshooting.

These learning paths cover everything from query-less data exploration to infrastructure monitoring, application observability, and specialized integrations. Each journey provides hands-on experience with real-world scenarios, helping you build practical skills that apply directly to your monitoring challenges.
In this section, you'll open the learning paths catalog in a new tab and pick journeys that match your goals.
Open the Grafana learning paths catalog in a new browser tab.
Browse the available learning paths by category: **Data exploration**, **Infrastructure monitoring**, **Application observability**, and **Data ingestion**.
Select learning paths that match your technology stack and monitoring goals. For example, if you use Kubernetes, consider **Monitor Kubernetes cluster infrastructure in Grafana Cloud**.
Bookmark or save the journeys you want to complete, start with ones that build on this onboarding experience, and progress from foundational to advanced.
You opened the catalog and identified learning paths to continue your observability journey.

**Recommended next steps**

Based on your onboarding journey completion, consider these learning paths:

- [Explore data using Metrics Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-metrics/): Learn query-less metric exploration techniques
- [Explore logs using Logs Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-logs/): Master log investigation without writing queries
- [Monitor a Linux server in Grafana Cloud](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/linux-server-integration/): Implement comprehensive server monitoring
- [Send metrics to Grafana Cloud using Prometheus remote write](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/prom-remote-write/): Configure advanced metric ingestion

Each journey provides practical, hands-on experience that builds your observability expertise and helps you solve real monitoring challenges in your environment.

In the next milestone, you'll celebrate completing this onboarding journey and discover your path forward in the Grafana community.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [All Grafana learning paths](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/)
- [Grafana tutorials](https://grafana.com/tutorials/)
